## Release Target

What is being proposed?

- adapter release
- dataset snapshot
- evaluation summary
- repository release

## Version

## Training Snapshot

- train dataset:
- validation dataset:
- base model:

## Validation Summary

Summarize the current validation state.

## Release Risks

List the known risks or missing items.

## Checklist

- [ ] Train/validation overlap is zero or explicitly justified
- [ ] Relevant docs are updated
- [ ] License files are accurate
- [ ] Release notes are prepared
